description: Ground-truth cases for compliance benchmark. Each case defines one substitution scenario: which product, which raw material to replace, and what results we expect the compliance engine to return. Rankings produced by an independent oracle (claude-opus-4-7) applying the 5-dimension compliance rubric over enriched product and raw-material specs — scoped to 5 target companies (Nature's Nutrition, PRIME HYDRATION+, One A Day, New Chapter, Liquid I.V.) where the current supplier is PureBulk.

_field_reference.description: Human-readable explanation of the substitution scenario.
_field_reference.product_id: Integer DB id of the finished-good product.
_field_reference.raw_material_id: Integer DB id of the raw material being replaced.
_field_reference.expected_ids: Raw-material IDs that SHOULD appear in the top-K results. Precision/Recall/F1 computed against this set.
_field_reference.ideal_ranking: expected_ids ordered best-to-worst. Used for NDCG and MRR.
_field_reference.difficulty: 'easy' (top≥75, spread<10), 'medium' (moderate), 'hard' (top<60, few candidates, or oracle fallback).
_field_reference.oracle_scores: Per-position scores (0–100) returned by the oracle. Debug trace only — not used by the benchmark.
_field_reference.note: Present only when oracle fallback was used (expected_ids seeded from raw candidates).
